name: Sigma Lithium Corporation
description: Sigma Lithium Corporation is a leading global lithium producer dedicated to powering the next generation of electric vehicle batteries with environmentally sustainable and high-purity lithium concentrate. The company operates the Grota do Cirilo project in Brazil, one of the largest and highest-grade hard rock lithium spodumene deposits in the world. Sigma Lithium is distinguished by its commitment to 'Green Lithium,' utilizing 100% renewable energy, 100% recycled water, and dry-stacking tailings to minimize its environmental footprint while ensuring a reliable supply chain for the global electrification transition.
